emails.subject: Re: #493770
emails.body: Re: #493770 This has been changed. And regarding the EES acquisition from the end of last year, I spoke with Kim Hundl briefly about it yesterday. I was a little unclear about the question in your e-mail to Carla, which was forwarded to me. Please give me a call or shoot me an e-mail, and we'll figure this out. Tracy Ngo, our Portland credit person, knows all about it, so between us we should be able to clarify this. Thanks, Kate From: Sharen Cason 01/11/2001 07:16 AM
#493770 This deal has an NP delivery point with firm energy. Let me know when it is corrected. Thanks!
